[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000100 3
1 0111000110 5
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0001111011 6
6 1001111110 7
7 1011110111 8
